race.comment: MOONLIGHT DREAM (1) went one better here last time after missing by a lip two back. Drops back in trip off a 62-day freshen and gets some help under the big weight with the claimer going on. Good chance to make it two on the bounce. GROUP CHAT (12) has mixed her form this time in but her peaks stack up strongly. Worth noting she broke her maiden over this track and trip in style last campaign. Have to take seriously. Dubbo maiden winner NARMER (4) has upside and is worth keeping in mind. SIR LUNCHALOTS (3) dug deep to win last start and has to be included off the back of that effort.
